title: Placement+
description: No longer being updated. It is recommended to use https://modrinth.com/mod/smartblockplacement (with Connector) instead of this mod if you are on 1.21.1.
body:
**Placement+** is a forge mod that removes the placement delay when placeing blocks by holdng down right click. It is based off of [Accurate Block Placement Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/accurate-block-placement-reforged), except without the bedrockify feature (because Quark already has it). It also re-adds the ability to toggle the mod on and off like the orginal fabric version.



Mod disabled:
![Mod Disabled](https://i.imgur.com/mXtQ8qM.gif)

Mod Enabled:
![Mod Enabled](https://i.imgur.com/3clt4LI.gif)
